key_facts: The Rheonics SRV NPT sensor is designed for inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The sensor features an M12 8-pin male electrical connector.
It uses a 3/4" NPT thread for mounting.
Rheonics products are patented in the US and internationally.
Rheonics operates in Switzerland and USA.
